positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a celestial creature—a stylized phoenix rising from a minimalist geometric lotus bloom. The phoenix should have strong, clean, flowing lines and vibrant, contrasting colors (deep cosmic indigo, burnt orange, and gold accents). The composition must be centered and suitable for apparel printing, emphasizing clean silhouettes and dramatic contrast. Utilize Art Nouveau elements mixed with modern graphic design aesthetics. The background should be a subtle, gradient midnight blue, allowing the primary subject to pop. High contrast, clean lines, vector quality, deep matte finish, perfect symmetry, print-ready art, isolated subject.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, jpeg artifacts, busy background, gradients in background, photorealistic, cartoon, messy, abstract mess
